visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) In a brightly lit Costco warehouse, a young woman wearing a patterned bucket hat and a white lace dress over a black long-sleeved shirt holds a large, brown bag of 'Karaage Japanese Fried Chicken' (CP brand). She points to a red scratch on her hand, gesturing towards the freezer behind her while smiling and speaking enthusiastically. (2) The camera cuts to a close-up of the Costco freezer shelves filled with various frozen chicken products, specifically highlighting the price tags and the yellow boxes. (3) The scene shifts to a home interior where the woman is sitting at a table with another woman in a black sweater. The woman in the hat holds the large chicken bag while the other woman uses a fork to pick up a piece of fried chicken from a black plate. (4) A close-up shows several golden-brown pieces of fried chicken on a black ceramic plate. A hand enters the frame and squeezes fresh lemon juice from a wedge onto the chicken pieces. (5) Back at the table, both women are shown tasting the chicken. The woman in the black sweater chews thoughtfully and gestures with her hands while explaining her feedback. The woman in the hat listens and reacts with expressions of agreement and interest.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 好吃到受傷. (2) [Subtitle]: 我為了拿它受傷了. 大家拿的時候手要小心喔. (3) [Subtitle]: 這是最新出的. (4) [Slogan]: 超便宜. 429元1.5公斤. [Variety]: delicious. (5) [Subtitle]: 卜蜂日式唐揚炸雞. 我們回去看看有沒有好吃. (6) [Subtitle]: 因為上次吃這個雞胸丁超級美味. (7) [Subtitle]: 希望他不要讓我失望. 都為了拿它手受傷了. (8) [Slogan]: 429元. [Variety]: delicious. (9) [Subtitle]: 卜蜂日式唐揚炸雞. 裡面有兩袋. (10) [Subtitle]: 然後一袋是750公克. 總共1.5公斤. (11) [Subtitle]: 一袋呢是215元. 那它這個炸雞呢. (12) [Subtitle]: 我覺得它的皮沒有到很酥脆. 可是它裡面的雞肉真的是非常的油潤多汁. (13) [Subtitle]: 吃了會噴汁的那一種. [Variety]: 讚喔更完美. (14) [Subtitle]: 那調味也是非常的重. 已經調的很好好了. 有一點煙燻的香氣. (15) [Subtitle]: 我們自己再去加一點檸檬汁. 覺得更完美. (16) [Subtitle]: 你覺得好吃嗎? 我覺得還不錯. (17) [Subtitle]: 只是可惜的地方在於它用氣炸鍋. 沒辦法炸的皮酥又脆. (18) [Subtitle]: 因為大成酥炸雞胸肉那一款. (19) [Subtitle]: 它用氣炸鍋就可以炸的酥酥脆脆的. (20) [Subtitle]: 可是這一款呢. 就是它用氣炸鍋出來皮還是有點偏軟. (21) [Subtitle]: 所以如果你很吃唐揚雞口感的人. 可能不會那麼喜歡.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator in a bucket hat, 1 female friend sitting at the dining table.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main creator is a young woman wearing a black long-sleeved shirt under a white lace sleeveless dress and a silver/patterned bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first scene is inside a Costco warehouse with large industrial freezers and price labels. The second scene is in a modern apartment with a clean dining table and warm lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a female voice speaking in an excited, high-arousal tone over a medium-tempo synth-pop BGM. The speaker's pitch is relatively high and variable. A bright 'ding' SFX coincides with the appearance of the Costco logo. (2) As the speaker describes her minor injury, the BGM continues consistently. A sharp metallic 'clink' is heard as she gestures. (3) Transitioning to the home setting, the BGM maintains its volume as a second female voice enters the mix. This voice is lower in pitch and more contemplative. Subtle plastic rustling sounds are heard as the chicken bag is handled. (4) Throughout the tasting segment, multiple digital 'pop' and 'ting' SFX are triggered as text slogans appear on screen. The vocal interaction between the two women is natural, with moderate speech rates and clear articulation.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Intro -> Demonstration -> Tasting -> Comparison -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a lifestyle food review aimed at Costco shoppers. It utilizes a personal 'hook' (the creator getting a scratch while reaching for the product) to grab attention, followed by an enthusiastic introduction of a new CP brand Japanese fried chicken product. The narrative then moves into a home testing environment where the texture, juiciness, and flavor are critiqued, including a direct comparison with another popular brand's chicken to provide practical consumer advice.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product showcase of the 'CP' brand packaging, specific pricing information, and highlighting it as a 'new arrival' at Costco.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses high-density text overlays and social-native editing to maintain engagement. The comparison between CP and Dacheng chicken brands provides specific value for the target audience.
